RuleName: Period out of Balance
RuleDescription:
Period out of Balance: [Scheduled Payment] - [Lease liability Interest Expense] - [Liability Reduction Amount] <> 0

Note: Will only check periods from 6/1/2020 or later as this is when the bug was fixed. It was determined immaterial to modify already processed periods.

RuleName: Period out of Balance
RuleDescription:
Period out of Balance: [-Asset Amortization] + [Level Expense] + [Liability Reduction Amount] - [Scheduled Payment] <> 0

Note: Will only check periods from 6/1/2020 or later as this is when the bug was fixed. It was determined immaterial to modify already processed periods.

RuleName: Period out of Balance
RuleDescription: Period out of Balance: [-Asset Amortization[F]] + [Level Expense [F]] + [Liability Reduction Amount] - [Scheduled Payment]

RuleName: Functional Currency
RuleDescription:
If local and functional currency is the same, then the amounts should be the same.

Functional Asset amortization <> local asset amortization WHEN functional currency = local currency

RuleName: Negative Asset Balance
RuleDescription: Instance where the asset balance is negative.

RuleName: Effective Interest Rate
RuleDescription: Instances where the effective rate is not calculated correctly from annual rate.

RuleName: Zero Amount/Adjustment
RuleDescription: Indicates $0 charges in a schedule.

RuleName: Discount Rate Profile out of Sync
RuleDescription: Indicates discount rate is not reflective of associated discount rate profile.

RuleName: Present Value is less than half of Total Amount
RuleDescription: Indicates that the discount rate entered may be too high.

RuleName: GL Account in GLEvent is different than the GL Account for the scheduled transaction
RuleDescription: Indicates an integration or data import issue where events and accounts are not matching.

RuleName: Multiple schedules for the same SourceImportID
RuleDescription: Indicates that the same SourceImportID was used for more than one ETL upload file.

RuleName: LeaseAllocations do not Total 100
RuleDescription: LeaseAllocations do not Total 100

RuleName: Incorrect payment amount in period 1
RuleDescription: Incorrect payment amount in period index 1 due to a retroactive remeasure back to inception

RuleName: Recurring Charges due past lease expiration date
RuleDescription: Recurring Charges due past lease expiration date.

RuleName: Period out of Balance
RuleDescription: Opening asset balance in Period 1 is not equal to the Closing asset balance in Period 0.

RuleName: LeaseExpense not part of theamortizationschedule.
RuleDescription:
This charge is a LeaseExpense (recognition category) but is not part of an Amortization schedule.

Charges flagged as lease expense are expected to be part of an amortization schedule.

RuleName: Short Term Liability Adjustment incorrect
RuleDescription: The short term liability adjustment is not the expected value.

RuleName: Level Expense Calculation Error
RuleDescription: Instances where the level expense is not calculated correctly.

RuleName: Missing currency exchange rate
RuleDescription: An exchange rate for the selected currency is not available.

RuleName: Retroactive Remeasure on day 1 - Error in Long Term Liability Reduction
RuleDescription: The long term liability reduction is not the expected value.

RuleName: Retroactive Remeasure on day 1 - Error in Long Term and Short Term Liability Adjustment
RuleDescription: The long & short term liability adjustment are not the expected values.

RuleName: Option Charge Currency Exchange Rate
RuleDescription: The target local currency rate was used for reasonably certain option charges when uploading the data using the ETL accounting template instead of the currency defined for the option charge.

RuleName: Editing initial schedule instead of remeasuring from day 1
RuleDescription: This scenario occurs when the user performs a Day 1 remeasure when the user should have edited the existing schedule. Since the initial Accounting schedule has not processed the Journal Entry for the beginning balance, it was still eligible to be edited. The data correction remeasurement from Day 1 only needs to occur if the Journal Entry for beginning balance has been processed. This can result in an unbalanced Journal entry if the profile does not have liability adjustment accounts defined for opening balance Journal Entries.

RuleName: Duplicate Initial Schedules
RuleDescription: This issue was caused by using different Source Import IDs with ETL Accounting for the same LeaseID, Classification, and amortization profile combination. This can result in an incorrect remeasurement.

RuleName: Accounting End date does not align with charge end date
RuleDescription: The accounting end date does not align with the max charge end date.

RuleName: Retro schedule exists without any retro periods
RuleDescription: Retro schedule exists without any retro periods

RuleName: Decimal precision does not match the currency ISO standard
RuleDescription: The saved values in the amortization table do not match the precision level of the local or functionality currency. (i.e. The schedules payments column has 2 decimals values in JPY, which should be zero decimals.)

RuleName: Custom calendar error: Period assigned to multiple quarters
RuleDescription: Period exists more than once in the amortization table.

RuleName: Journal Entry is out of balance
RuleDescription: The Journal Entry created for this period does not balance.

RuleName: Gain (Loss) Adjustment value is incorrect.
RuleDescription: Gain (Loss) expected value = [Asset Adjustment Amount] - [Liability Adjustment Amount] - [termination fee]

RuleName: GL Payment Modification
RuleDescription: Charge amount, start date, end date, or frequency has been modified since the Accounting Schedule was saved.

RuleName: Multiple Transactions due on the same date within a charge stream
RuleDescription: This issue could be caused by an invalid update via ETL expenses.

RuleName: Invalid Recognition Category
RuleDescription: Identifies charges included in the amortization schedule, but which do not have a valid recognition category.

RuleName: Deleted GL Event
RuleDescription: Identifies deleted charges included in the amortization schedule.

RuleName: Compound Frequency Type Mismatch
RuleDescription: Compound Frequency Type Mismatch. Compound Frequency discrepancy between initial and remeasure(d) schedule.

RuleName: GL AccountPortfolio is different than the LeasePortfolio
RuleDescription: GL AccountPortfolio is different than the LeasePortfolio

RuleName: Period out of Balance
RuleDescription:
Multiple remeasures on the same day where Liability Balance Opening from Period 0 <> Initial Present Value.

This scenario occurs when remeasuring 2 or more times on the same day resulting in an unbalanced balance Journal Entry.

RuleName: Accounting Term is greater than 12 months but flagged as a short term lease exception.
RuleDescription: Accounting Term is greater than 12 months but flagged as a short term lease exception.

RuleName: Calendar Day of Period is greater than days in the Period
RuleDescription: Calendar Day of Period is greater than days in the Period

RuleName: Long Term Liability Reduction not correct
RuleDescription: Long Term Liability Reduction <> [Liability Reduction] - [Short Term Liability Reduction]

RuleName: Interest expense has an unexpected amount in the period when liability matures
RuleDescription: Interest expense has an unexpected amount in the period when liability matures

RuleName: Historical charge data is not available.
RuleDescription: This occurs when attempting to remeasure a schedule using daily compounding that occurs mid-period.

RuleName: Mid-period remeasurement Beginning Balance error due to historical charge data not available.
RuleDescription: This occurred prior to release 27 when the system allowed a daily compounding remeasure to occur mid-period. This is not an issue provided the charge data had not changed since the initial schedule was created. It can be an issue where the opening balances are incorrect because the system used an incorrect value for the charges to determine a daily balance.

RuleName: Total Accumulated AssetAmortization
RuleDescription: A calculation error occurred when performing a mid-period remeasure on the Accumulated Assetamortization.

RuleName: Multiple Published Schedules with Same MasterScheduleID
RuleDescription: There should only be 1 Published amortization schedule in the chain of remeasurements.

RuleName: Retro Adjustment with Multiple Journal Entries
RuleDescription: There should only be 1 period on a retro schedule that has a JE status which can be processed.

RuleName: Accounting schedule references deleted discount rate profile
RuleDescription: This scenario can exist due to a prior bug that allowed deleting of profiles even if there were active accounting schedules.

RuleName: Functional Currency should not be different than initial schedule
RuleDescription: This scenario can exist due to a prior bug that allowed a user to change the functional currency when remeasuring.

RuleName: Functional Currency rate is 1.0 but functional currency is not equal to local currency
RuleDescription: When the functional currency is different than the local currency, then the exchange rate should most likely not be equal to 1. This usually indicates a data input mistake but there are rare scenarios where the exchange rate could be 1.

RuleName: Period out of Balance
RuleDescription:
Period 0 Opening Asset Balance does not equal Present Value from initial schedule.

This scenario can exist due to a prior behavior for how the application calculated the opening asset balance on a day 1 remeasure when there was a manual adjustment.

RuleName: Day 1 Remeasure when day 1 begins on last day of a period
RuleDescription: This scenario exists due to a prior bug that occured only when a day 1 remeasurement occured and day 1 occured on the last day of a period.

RuleName: Level Expense Calculation Error with Periodic Amortization
RuleDescription: This scenario exists due to a prior bug.

RuleName: Liability maturing period has a negative payment
RuleDescription: The last period with a payment should not be a negative amount

RuleName: GL Account is not part of AmortizationProfile
RuleDescription: There is a charge that is part of an accounting schedule, however, it should not be based on the profile. This could happen if the profile's set of accounts was modified after the accounting schedule was created.

RuleName: Missing GL Event from AmortizationProfile
RuleDescription:
There is a charge with an account that is part of anamortization profile, however, the charge is not a part of the selected charges. Excludes amortization schedules that have been manually overwritten.

This could happen if the profile's set of accounts was modified after the accounting schedule was created.

RuleName: Cannot change functional Rate on day 1 when local Asset Adjustment is zero
RuleDescription: The system does not support changing functional rate when there is local adjustment is zero.

RuleName: Discount Rate Profile is not part of this Lease Portfolio
RuleDescription: The discount rate profile has been moved to another portfolio and this accounting schedule should be remeasured using a profile within the corresponding portfolio.

RuleName: Amortization Profile is not part of this Lease Portfolio
RuleDescription: The amortization profile has been moved to another portfolio and this accounting schedule should be remeasured using a profile within the corresponding portfolio.

RuleName: Published Schedule is missing
RuleDescription: An error occurred resulting in a missing published record.

RuleName: Published amortization table is missing
RuleDescription: An error occurred resulting in a missing published record.

RuleName: Rent Gap
RuleDescription: There is a gap in date coverage of rental payments.

RuleName: Negative Scheduled Payments in Amortization Table
RuleDescription: A possible data input mistake resulting in negative payment for a period.

RuleName: Accounting Days In Term is incorrect
RuleDescription: Accounting Days In Term is incorrect

RuleName: Test Result does not match Classification
RuleDescription: Test Result does not match Classification
